items.name: Target Required
items.description: This cards’ power is set to 0, when there is no card opposing it.

items.name: Whimsical Healer
items.description: During your end step, target 1 card on your side of the field, that card gains 1 health to a maximum of 5 health.

items.name: Inscrybe
items.description: When a card is played opposite this card, the opponent selects 1 card from their hand. They discard that card, and the card opposite this one gains the discarded cards sigils until it perishes. Then this card perishes.

items.name: Unkillable
items.description: When this card perishes, it goes back to your hand instead of being discarded.

items.name: Tarot Reading
items.description: The crossover adds more than just some new cards with unique effects. What their secret if for I don’t know, but I'm sure you’ll piece it together.

items.name: Death Veil
items.description: If an opposing card damages this card and this card does not perish, that card perishes.

items.name: Easy Target
items.description: All opposing cards will attack this card when they attack.

items.name: Worthy Sacrifice
items.description: This card is worth 3 blood when it is sacrificed.

items.name: Waterborne
items.description: Attacks targeting this card instead hit the owner of this card directly.

items.name: Unspeakable
items.description: While searching your deck for a specified card, this card may be searched instead.

items.name: True Scholar
items.description: During your play step, you can destroy all Mox cards on your side of the field, draw cards from your deck equal to the number of cards destroyed.

items.name: Trifurcated Strike
items.description: This card attacks the lanes left and right of, as well as, the opposing space when it attacks.

items.name: Touch Of Death
items.description: When this card damages an opposing card, that card perishes.

items.name: Strong Hand
items.description: This cards’ power is equal to the number of cards in the owners’ hand, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Stinky
items.description: While this card is on the field, the opposing card has their power reduced by 1.

items.name: Stimulate
items.description: During your play step, you may pay 2 energy to increase the power of this card by 1. If this card has 5 power, the effect cannot be used.

items.name: Steel Trap
items.description: When this card perishes by battle, the opposing card is dealt 10 damage.

items.name: Squirrel Shedder
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent empty lane. Search 1 “Squirrel” card from your side deck and play it in this card’s previous lane.

items.name: Sprinter
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent empty lane.

items.name: Split Blood
items.description: This cards power becomes equal to the number of cards sacrificed during your play step the turn this card is played, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Spine Walker
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent empty lane, generating 1 bone in the process.

items.name: Spawn Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, during your end step search 1 “L33PB0T” from your side deck and play it within an empty space on your side of the field.

items.name: Sniper
items.description: When this card attacks, it can attack any 1 space on the opponents side of the field.

items.name: Snapshot
items.description: When this card is played, target 1 card on the field. Discard that card.

items.name: Skeleton Crew
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent empty lane. Search 1 “Skeleton” card from your side deck and play it in this card’s previous lane

items.name: Sharp Quills
items.description: When a card attacks this card, that card takes 1 damage.

items.name: Sentry
items.description: When a card is played, or moved opposite this card, this card deals the opposing card 1 damage.

items.name: Scavenger
items.description: While this card is on the field, when an opposing card perishes, you gain a bone.

items.name: Scattered Bones
items.description: This cards’ power is equal to half the number of unspent bones the owner has, rounded down and to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Ruby Heart
items.description: When this card perishes, search 1 “Ruby Mox” from your side deck and play it in this space.

items.name: Rooted
items.description: This card cannot move from the space it is played in except by perishing.

items.name: Repulsive
items.description: If an opposing card would attack this card, negate that attack.

items.name: Rampager
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent lane, swapping places with the card in that lane if possible.

items.name: Rabbit Hole
items.description: When this card is played, search 1 “Rabbit” from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Purist
items.description: While this card is on the field, the opposing card’s sigils are nullified.

items.name: Prism Gem
items.description: While this card is on the field, it provides 1 gem of any color.

items.name: Power Dice
items.description: During your play step, you can pay 1 energy to roll a 6 sided die. This cards’ power is equal to the number rolled.

items.name: Piercing
items.description: When this card damages an opposing card, half the damage dealt, rounded down, is dealt to your opponent as well.

items.name: Particle Scan
items.description: When this card is played, target 1 card in your hand. Search a copy of it from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Overclocked
items.description: This cards’ power becomes equal to the amount of energy spent during your play step the turn this card is played, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Orange Gem
items.description: While this card is on the field, it provides 1 Ruby Gem.

items.name: Orange Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, it provides 1 Ruby Gem.

items.name: Trinket Bearer
items.description: When this card is played, draw 1 card from your deck or side deck.

items.name: Null Conduit
items.description: This card may complete a circuit, but provides no effect.

items.name: Omnistrike
items.description: This card attacks all opposing spaces when it attacks.

items.name: Moximum Magick
items.description: When this card is on the field, it provides 2 gems of any color.

items.name: Mox Dropper
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent lane. Search 1 “Mox” card from your side deck and play it in this cards space.

items.name: Mighty Leap
items.description: If the opposing card has the Airborne sigil, it attacks this card instead of attacking directly.

items.name: Mental Gemnastics
items.description: When this card is played, draw cards from your deck equal to the number of Mox cards on your side of the field.

items.name: Magickal Bleach
items.description: When this card is played, target 1 card on the field. any sigils that card has are negated until it perishes.

items.name: Many Lives
items.description: When this card is sacrificed, it does not perish.

items.name: Made Of Stone
items.description: This card is unaffected by the effects of Stinky and Touch of Death.

items.name: Looter
items.description: When this card deals damage directly, draw a card for each damage dealt by this card.

items.name: Leader
items.description: While this card is on the field, increase the power of the cards left and right by 1.

items.name: Loaded
items.description: When this card perishes, draw a total of 3 cards from your deck and/or side deck.

items.name: Insta-Bomber
items.description: When this card is played, target 1 card on the field. That card takes 10 damage.

items.name: Hoarder
items.description: When this card is played search any 1 card from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Hopper
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to any empty space on your side of the board.

items.name: Hefty
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent lane, moving cards in the way with it if possible.

items.name: Hearty Offering
items.description: This card is worth blood equal to its’ current health when it is sacrificed.

items.name: Healing Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, during your end step all cards inside the circuit gain 1 health, to a maximum of 5 health.

items.name: Haunter
items.description: When this card perishes, select 1 card on your side of the field. That card gains all other sigils on this card.

items.name: Handy
items.description: When this card is played, discard your hand, then draw a total of 4 cards from your deck and/or side deck.

items.name: Guardian
items.description: When an opposing card is played opposite of an empty space, this card moves to that space.

items.name: Grim Epitaph
items.description: When this card is played, search your discard pile for 1 card and add it to your hand.

items.name: Green Gem
items.description: While this card is on the field, it provides 1 Emerald Gem.

items.name: Green Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, it provides 1 Emerald Gem.

items.name: Gravity
items.description: When this card is played, target 1 card on the opposing side of the field and move it to an empty space on your side of the field.

items.name: Grand Mox
items.description: While this card is on the field, 1 Ruby Gem, 1 Sapphire Gem, and 1 Emerald Gem.

items.name: Gift Bearer
items.description: When this card perishes, draw 1 card from your deck.

items.name: Gem Skeptic
items.description: While this card is on the field, you may not play any Mox cards.

items.name: Gem Powered
items.description: This card’s power is equal to the number of gems provided on your side of the field, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Gem Guardian
items.description: While this card is on the field, any attacks targeting Mox cards on your side of the field are negated.

items.name: Gem Dependant
items.description: If there are no gems on your side of the field, this card perishes.

items.name: Gem Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, it provides 1 Sapphire Gem, 1 Ruby Gem, and 1 Emerald Gem.

items.name: Gem Animator
items.description: While this card is on the field, all Mox cards on your side of the field gain 1 power.

items.name: Frog Friend
items.description: During your end step, this card moves to an adjacent empty lane. Search 1 “Frog” card from your deck and play it in this card’s previous lane.

items.name: Frozen Away
items.description: When this card perishes, search 1 “[Token]” from your deck and play it in this card’s place.

items.name: Fledgling
items.description: During your next play step after this card is played, it ages into a “[Token]”.

items.name: Fecundity
items.description: When this card is played, search 1 copy of it from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Facsimile
items.description: This cards’ power is equal to the opposing cards` power.

items.name: Enlarge
items.description: During your play step, you may pay 2 bones to increase the health of this card by 1. If this card has 5 health, the effect cannot be used.

items.name: Energy Gun
items.description: During your play step, you may pay 1 energy to a card opposing this card.

items.name: Energy Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, your energy does not deplete from its current level.

items.name: Double Strike
items.description: This card attacks the opposing space twice when it attacks.

items.name: Double Death
items.description: When this card is on the field, any cards that perish on your side of the field perish a second time.

items.name: Disentomb
items.description: During your play step, you may pay 1 bone to search 1 Skeleton from your side deck to your hand.

items.name: Divination
items.description: When this card is played, look at the top 3 cards of your deck, rearrange them in any order, and put them back on top of your deck.

items.name: Detonator
items.description: When this card perishes, adjacent and opposing cards are dealt 10 damage.

items.name: Defiler
items.description: When this card perishes, draw a card from your deck and discard it,

items.name: Dam Builder
items.description: When this card is played, play a “Dam” card in adjacent empty lanes.

items.name: Corpse Eater
items.description: When a card on your side of the field perishes by battle, this card is played in its place.

items.name: Convalesce
items.description: During your end step, this card gains 1 health, to a maximum of 5 health.

items.name: Colony
items.description: This cards power is equal to the number of cards with the colony sigil on your side of the field.

items.name: Brood Parasite
items.description: When this card is played, play 1 “Broken Egg” card in the opposing space if that space is empty.

items.name: Brittle
items.description: During your end step, this card perishes.

items.name: Boneless
items.description: This card does not generate a bone when it perishes.

items.name: Burrower
items.description: If an opposing card would attack an empty lane, this card moves to be hit instead.

items.name: Bonehorn
items.description: During your play step, you may pay 1 energy to gain 3 bones, This card can only do this once per turn.

items.name: Bone King
items.description: When this card perishes, it provides 4 bones instead of 1.

items.name: Bone Digger
items.description: During your end step, this card provides 1 bone.

items.name: Blue Conduit
items.description: When this card is part of a circuit, it provides 1 Sapphire Gem.

items.name: Blue Gem
items.description: When this card is on the field, it provides 1 Sapphire Gem.

items.name: Bloodsucker
items.description: When this card damages the health of an opposing card, this card restores 1 health, to a maximum of 5 health.

items.name: Bloodlust
items.description: When this card kills an opposing card. its power increases by 1, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Bloodless
items.description: This card cannot be sacrificed.

items.name: Black Hole
items.description: During your opponents end step, if a card is opposing this card, that card perishes.

items.name: Bifurcated Strike
items.description: This card attacks only the lanes left and right of the opposing space when it attacks.

items.name: Bellist
items.description: When this card is played, play a “Chime” card in adjacent empty lanes.

items.name: Bell Ringer
items.description: During either end step, this cards’ power increases by 1, to a maximum of 5 power.

items.name: Bees Within
items.description: When this card is damaged, search 1 “Bee” from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Battery Breaker
items.description: When this card is on the field, your maximum energy cells are reduced by 1.

items.name: Battery Bearer
items.description: When this card is played, it provides 1 energy cell to its owner,

items.name: Bastion
items.description: When this card takes damage, it only takes half the damage it normally would, rounded up.

items.name: Attack Conduit
items.description: While this card is part of a circuit, all cards inside the circuit gain 1 power.

items.name: Armored
items.description: The first time this card would take damage, negate that damage.

items.name: Aquanaut
items.description: If the opposing card has the Waterborne sigil, this card attacks it direct;y.

items.name: Ant Spawner
items.description: When this card is played, search 1 “Worker Ant” from your deck to your hand.

items.name: Annoying
items.description: When this card is on the field, the opposing card has their power increased by 1.

items.name: Amorphous
items.description: When this card is played, select 1 card from your discard pile. This card gains the selected cards’ sigils until it perishes.

items.name: Airborne
items.description: This card attacks the opponent directly instead of the opposing card.
